summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of DentaLine AI landing page. All 16 specified features tested and working correctly including hero section with waveform animation, CTA buttons, pricing toggle, FAQ accordion, mobile responsiveness, and smooth scroll navigation.
passed_tests: Hero section renders with headline, subheadline, animated waveform, trust badges
Book a Free Demo CTA button functionality
Pause Animation button toggles waveform animation
Problem/Solution section displays with correct icons and text
How It Works 3-step section displays numbered steps
Features grid shows 6 feature cards in 2x3 layout
Testimonials section with 3 testimonial cards and metrics
Pricing section with 3 tiers and Monthly/Annual toggle
CTA banner with Book Your Free Demo button
Footer renders with logo, 12 links, 3 social icons
Smooth scroll to sections via nav links
